intro: Molongum laxum, also known as Molongum, is a plant species native to the tropical regions of the Pacific Islands, particularly in Fiji and Samoa, belonging to the family Menispermaceae. The health benefits of Molongum laxum include its use in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. Bioactive constituents of the plant include lignans, alkaloids, and glycosides, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
